item.title: Kyosho Caliber 30 Setup
item.description: Setup for mode 2 The manual explain a complete setup and is one best of its kind. EMS MODE (CCPM 120Â° type) Futaba Radio FF9 Mode 2 (european TX) in manual only mode 1 is specified (american) USE ONLY 3 identical servo for aileron, elevator and pitch (same brand and reference) otherwise the swash-plate will not go up and down correctly. | Reverse | Name | Channel | Mode | |—|—|—| | Aileron | 1 | Normal | | Elevator | 2 | Normal | | Throttle | 3 | Reverse | | Rudder | 4 | Reverse | | Gyro | 5 | Normal | | Pitch | 6 | Reverse | | SWASH-AFR | Name | Channel | value | |—|—|—|—| | Aileron | 1 | +65% | | Elevator | 2 | +65% | | Pitch | 6 | -65%
